detectors.description:
Reentrancy in KayApache._transfer(address,address,uint256) (KayApache.sol#667-791):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (KayApache.sol#731)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (KayApache.sol#805-817)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (KayApache.sol#737)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (KayApache.sol#825)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (KayApache.sol#789)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (KayApache.sol#951)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (KayApache.sol#931)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (KayApache.sol#933)
	KayApache._rOwned (KayApache.sol#337) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- KayApache._takeTeam(uint256) (KayApache.sol#945-953)
	- KayApache._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (KayApache.sol#905-941)
	- KayApache.balanceOf(address) (KayApache.sol#493-497)
	- KayApache.constructor() (KayApache.sol#427-457)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (KayApache.sol#789)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (KayApache.sol#959)
	KayApache._rTotal (KayApache.sol#351) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- KayApache._getCurrentSupply() (KayApache.sol#1101-1111)
	- KayApache._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (KayApache.sol#957-963)
	- KayApache.constructor() (KayApache.sol#427-457)
	- KayApache.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (KayApache.sol#589-611)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [KayApache._transfer(address,address,uint256)](KayApache.sol#L667-L791):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](KayApache.sol#L731)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](KayApache.sol#L805-L817)
	External calls sending eth:

		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](KayApache.sol#L825)
	State variables written after the call(s):

		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](KayApache.sol#L951)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](KayApache.sol#L931)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](KayApache.sol#L933)
	[KayApache._rOwned](KayApache.sol#L337) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [KayApache._takeTeam(uint256)](KayApache.sol#L945-L953)
	- [KayApache._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](KayApache.sol#L905-L941)
	- [KayApache.balanceOf(address)](KayApache.sol#L493-L497)
	- [KayApache.constructor()](KayApache.sol#L427-L457)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](KayApache.sol#L789)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](KayApache.sol#L959)
	[KayApache._rTotal](KayApache.sol#L351) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [KayApache._getCurrentSupply()](KayApache.sol#L1101-L1111)
	- [KayApache._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](KayApache.sol#L957-L963)
	- [KayApache.constructor()](KayApache.sol#L427-L457)
	- [KayApache.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](KayApache.sol#L589-L611)
